_doc: Manual chat-attribution overrides. The git-log regex catches '(handle report)' / 'per X' / 'X's bug' / 'requested by X' style commits, but plenty of asks aren't credited in the commit subject at all — often because the creation commit lands long before chat starts iterating on the app. This file lets us record chat-known attributions that the regex would otherwise miss. Each entry adds 1 lifetime point per (slug, handle) pair, attributed to the app's most recent commit timestamp so decay treats it like a recent ask.
